overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through Night City in heavy rain and fog. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle from an urban stadium district through wet city streets and onto an elevated highway before exiting to surface roads. The scene features prominent pink and cyan neon lighting, cyberpunk architecture, and persistent rainy atmosphere with reflective wet roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic stadium district with massive illuminated structure

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stationary position near stadium
leaving stadium plaza area, entering denser urban streets

agents.ego_description: accelerating through wet streets near a massive pink-lit stadium structure

entered.detail: massive building with bright pink neon lighting and geometric patterns
large commercial displays with glowing advertisements
tall cyberpunk architecture with glass and concrete facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive illuminated stadium structure glowing with pink neon light. The vehicle accelerates from a stop on wet asphalt roads, passing futuristic buildings and neon billboards while rain streaks across the windshield. The environment is foggy with limited visibility, characteristic of Night City's dense urban atmosphere.

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at intersection
proceeding through intersection as light changes

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersections, stopping at traffic signals and proceeding through crosswalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow clothing walking along sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story commercial structures with ground floor shops
suspended traffic signals showing red and green lights
road crossing with pedestrian crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: Driving through commercial city streets with multi-story buildings lining both sides. The vehicle stops at a traffic light before proceeding through the intersection. A pedestrian in distinctive yellow clothing walks along the right sidewalk. Neon signs and street lights illuminate the rainy environment while the vehicle navigates the wet roads.

events.description: entering elevated highway ramp with concrete barriers
accelerating to high speed exceeding 60 km/h on highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto elevated highway and maintaining high speed through curved sections

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with headlights visible ahead on the highway

entered.detail: tall concrete walls lining both sides of the elevated roadway
elevated road crossing overhead with support pillars
tall street lamps illuminating the foggy highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters an elevated highway section enclosed by high concrete barriers. Speed increases significantly as the car navigates through foggy conditions on the multi-lane road. Overpass structures pass overhead while highway lights cut through the mist. The environment feels more enclosed and isolated compared to the surface streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: surface street with mixed residential and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting highway ramp and returning to surface streets
decelerating as vehicle navigates surface roads

agents.ego_description: exiting the highway ramp and slowing down on surface streets with palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm tree silhouettes visible against the foggy sky
cars parked along the side of the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway via a curved ramp and returns to surface streets. The environment transitions from enclosed highway to open urban roads lined with palm trees and parked vehicles. Speed decreases significantly as the car navigates through the wet streets, passing lower-rise buildings in the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-slicked metropolis, transitioning from a glowing stadium district to an enclosed highway before returning to open urban streets. It begins by accelerating away from a massive pink neon stadium through a foggy urban landscape where rain streaks across the windshield. As the vehicle navigates commercial streets lined with multi-story buildings and neon signs, it pauses at a traffic light beside a pedestrian in yellow before proceeding forward. The scene then shifts into a more isolated environment as the car enters an elevated highway, speeding through thick mist and under concrete overpasses. Finally, the vehicle descends via a curved ramp, leaving the enclosed highway behind to slow down among palm trees and lower-rise buildings on the wet surface roads.
